steps.title: Track the achievement list
steps.content: The passage lists Pierce's award, the Chicago Symphony performance, her body of compositions, and recent performances and recordings by major orchestras. Each detail contributes to a picture of recognition and significance.

steps.title: Focus on purpose, not advocacy
steps.content: B invents a call for more performances. C narrows the passage to musical influences even though style is only one detail. D invents a comparison between Pierce and European composers. The answer is A.
